DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT PETER FINDLEY'S MOTION TO QUASH AND OR MODIFY SUBPOENA BLACKROCK FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT, INC. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT PETER FINDLEY'S MOTION TO QUASH IS GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO THE SUBPOENA ARE RELEVANT TO THE CLAIMS IN THE IMMEDIATE ACTION. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT ARGUES THAT THE SAME DOCUMENTS WERE REQUESTED IN PARTY DISCOVERY BUT NOT PRODUCED BY DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT NOTWITHSTANDING THE ISSUANCE OF A PROTECTIVE ORDER. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT THESE DOCUMENTS WERE REQUESTED IN PARTY DISCOVERY. FURTHERMORE, PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT'S REMEDY IS TO MOVE TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES IF DOCUMENTS ARE NOT PRODUCED, NOT TO SEEK THE DOCUMENTS THROUGH THIRD PARTIES.PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. PREVAILING PARTY TO EMAIL THE PROPOSED ORDER DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT PETER.CATALANOTTI@WILSONELSER.COM BY 5:00PM TODAY. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DEFENDANT PETER FINDLEY's Motion To Quash And Or Modify Subpoena Blackrock Financial Management, Inc.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant and Cross-Complainant Peter Findley's Motion to Quash is GRANTED without prejudice. All requests for sanctions are denied. Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant has failed to establish that documents responsive to the subpoena are relevant to the claims in the immediate action. Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant argues that the same documents were requested in party discovery but not produced by Defendant and Cross-Complainant notwithstanding the issuance of a protective order. Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant has failed to provide sufficient evidence that these documents were requested in party discovery. Furthermore, Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant's remedy is to move to compel further responses if documents are not produced, not to seek the documents through third parties.
